contract_summary: Releases a reference on an anon_vma_name object. Decrements the kref via kref_put, which will call anon_vma_name_free when the refcount reaches zero. The caller must not use the object after calling this function. It is safe to pass NULL, in which case this is a no-op. This put must be paired with a prior get (e.g., anon_vma_name_get) that acquired the reference being released.
